text.title: Spring @Async Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to introduce Spring `@Async` to a service end-to-end.

step.name: define-pool-per-sla
step.action: For each SLA define a named `@Bean ThreadPoolTaskExecutor` (`emailExecutor`, `auditExecutor`). Size with `cores × (1 + wait_ratio / compute_ratio)`. Bound the queue capacity. Set `RejectedExecutionHandler = CallerRunsPolicy`.
step.decision-gate: If no executor is defined, BLOCK per `named-executor` rule.

step.name: install-task-decorator
step.action: Implement `TaskDecorator` that copies `MDC.getCopyOfContextMap()` + `SecurityContextHolder.getContext()` + tracing baggage before dispatch and restores on completion. Apply to every executor via `executor.setTaskDecorator(...)`.
step.decision-gate: If async tasks log without `requestId`, fail per `taskdecorator-context` rule.

step.name: annotate-methods
step.action: Annotate each method `@Async("<executor-name>")`. Change return type to `CompletableFuture<T>`. Inject the service into the caller (no self-invocation).
step.decision-gate: If self-invocation is detected, BLOCK per `no-self-invocation` rule.

step.name: wire-graceful-shutdown
step.input: Deploy SLA + max in-flight task duration
step.action: Set `setWaitForTasksToCompleteOnShutdown(true)` + `setAwaitTerminationSeconds(30)` on every executor. Add an `@PreDestroy` hook for cleanup if needed.

step.name: add-tests-with-awaitility
step.action: Author tests using `Awaitility.await().atMost(...)` for completion assertions. Configure tests to use a deterministic executor (`SyncTaskExecutor`) if the test focus is logic, not threading.
step.decision-gate: If `Thread.sleep` appears in async tests, fail per the no-thread-sleep convention.
